change.description: Fuse the proposer router's single-row 256-expert top-8 selection and routing softmax into one exact kernel, replacing generic topk_rows_i32 plus mtp_softmax_topk_f32 for this shape.

commands.control_suite: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_MTP_PROPOSER_ROUTER_TOPK_FUSED=0 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-router-topk-fused-off-9prompt-d32 --out benchmarks/results/2026-06-12-hipengine-mtp-router-topk-fused-off-9prompt-d32.json
commands.fused_suite: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-router-topk-fused-on-9prompt-d32 --out benchmarks/results/2026-06-12-hipengine-mtp-router-topk-fused-on-9prompt-d32.json
commands.profile_region: scripts/mtp_verifier_rocprof.py --region proposer_all, run off with HIPENGINE_MTP_PROPOSER_ROUTER_TOPK_FUSED=0 and on with the default fused path

decision: Promote fused proposer router top-k+softmax default-on. The original <21.5 ms wall milestone is crossed, but the row remains below 1.0x because visible-token density is unchanged at about 2.012/cycle.
